mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(IFNULL(t.tingchechangmingcheng,''), '·', IFNULL(t.quyu,'')) AS mingcheng, t.zongchewei AS zong, IFNULL(o.zaichang, 0) AS yiyong, GREATEST(0, t.zongchewei - IFNULL(o.zaichang, 0)) AS kongyu FROM ( SELECT tingchechangmingcheng, quyu, SUM(IFNULL(cheweishuliang, 0)) AS zongchewei FROM cheweixinxi GROUP BY tingchechangmingcheng, quyu ) t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.tingchechangmingcheng, c.quyu, COUNT(*) AS zaichang FROM chezijinchang c WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tingchejiaofei tf WHERE tf.crossrefid IS NOT NULL AND tf.crossrefid = c.id ) GROUP BY c.tingchechangmingcheng, c.quyu ) o ON (o.tingchechangmingcheng <=> t.tingchechangmingcheng AND o.quyu <=> t.quyu) ORDER BY t.tingchechangmingcheng, t.quyu
